description_long: This is a luxurious, black leather Chesterfield-style armchair with a deep, button-tufted backrest and armrests. The armrests are rolled and generously padded, adorned with a row of metallic studs along the front for a classic, elegant touch. The seat is wide and features a thick, plush cushion, providing ample comfort. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, creating a boxy, enveloping silhouette. The chair stands on four short, rounded wooden legs, barely visible beneath the base. The upholstery has a glossy finish, highlighting the smooth, high-quality leather material.
description: A black, button-tufted leather Chesterfield armchair with rolled, studded armrests and a plush seat cushion, supported by short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rolled, padded armrest and the deep button-tufted backrest, with the short wooden leg visible at the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical rolled armrests, button-tufted backrest, metallic stud detailing, and the wide, plush seat cushion.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same rolled armrest, tufted backrest, and wooden leg.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth, continuous back and the rounded top of the armrests, with minimal detail except for the overall shape.
attribute_armrest_design: rolled, padded, and upholstered in black leather with metallic stud detailing
attribute_backrest_style: tufted, rounded, and high, matching the height of the armrests with deep button detailing
